global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text and game icons.
global.main_message: Encouraging players to compete and play with friends.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a lively and energetic atmosphere.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Three circular game icons are positioned at the top right, each with a simple design and a white outline.

elements.label: Main text message
elements.description: Bold, black text in a modern font reads 'Beat your rivals' with a smaller line below it saying 'Play with friends tonight', conveying a competitive and social gaming theme.
elements.text_content: 88 Beat your rivals Play with friends tonight Watch now

elements.label: NeonArena logo
elements.description: The 'NeonArena' logo appears at the top left in a playful font, featuring a bright color that stands out against the green background.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and playful, Beat your rivals, Play with friends tonight
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the main text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: NeonArena, Beat your rivals, Play with friends tonight, Watch now
